pre-release.description:
This is a simple Proof-of-Concept for adding Archipelago Support to Slay the Spire II.

It includes:
- Three types of filler Gold rewards
- Basic UI
- Checks sent for each floor of the Spire reached

It's very rough and doesn't have anything else yet, but it's the proof-of-concept that matters. More will come soon!

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dlueben1/Slay-the-Spire-2-Archipelago/commits/pre-release
pre-release.title: Proof-of-Concept
